query: SELECT ds.saleDate, l.name, ds.taxExemptSales, ds.taxableSales, ds.totalSales, (ds.taxExemptSales + ds.taxableSales) as expectedTotal, ds.gstCollected, ds.qstCollected, ds.totalDeposit FROM dailySales ds LEFT JOIN locations l ON ds.locationId = l.id WHERE ds.saleDate = '2026-03-12' ORDER BY ds.locationId;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3M4hPncfDS8MBAb.82b03a6e50f8 --database h46y7gAGiyBszkHNcCdSHx --execute SELECT ds.saleDate, l.name, ds.taxExemptSales, ds.taxableSales, ds.totalSales, (ds.taxExemptSales + ds.taxableSales) as expectedTotal, ds.gstCollected, ds.qstCollected, ds.totalDeposit FROM dailySales ds LEFT JOIN locations l ON ds.locationId = l.id WHERE ds.saleDate = '2026-03-12' ORDER BY ds.locationId;
